plugins.name: meeting-ops
plugins.description: Meeting preparation, calendar scanning, and structured debriefs. Encodes Atlas's meeting methodology.

plugins.description: Daily inbox management — triage, escalation detection, follow-up cadences, voice-matched drafts, and SOD/EOD reporting.

plugins.description: Capture skills, insights, patterns, and corrections during work — never solve the same problem twice.

plugins.description: Build polished, self-contained HTML slide deck presentations with navigation, branded styling, and multiple slide types.

plugins.name: proactive-actions
plugins.description: After meeting debriefs, classify and execute action items autonomously — execute, draft, chase, or escalate.

plugins.name: travel-prep
plugins.description: Proactive travel preparation for executive travelers — onboarding, pre-trip briefings, and day-of support.
